allow: Bash(awk -F= '{ key=$1; val=$0; sub\(/^[^=]+=/, "", val\); print key " -> length=" length\(val\) ", first=" substr\(val,1,2\) "..., last=..." substr\(val, length\(val\)-1\) }')
Bash(awk -F= '{ val=$0; sub\(/^[^=]+=/, "", val\); for\(i=1;i<=length\(val\);i++\){c=substr\(val,i,1\); printf "%s\(%d\) ", c, ord[c]?ord[c]:0}; print "" }')
